_schema_note: Each use case = a buyer-intent search pattern (e.g., 'best HVAC software for solo contractors'). ranked_picks are tool slugs in priority order — handpicked to match the specific buyer profile, not auto-ranked.

use_cases.h1: Best HVAC Software for Solo Contractors in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: The 5 best HVAC software options for solo and 1-2 person HVAC operations. Real pricing, mobile-first, easy invoicing — picked for one-truck operators.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Solo HVAC contractor or 1-2 person operation
use_cases.intro: If you run an HVAC business by yourself or with one helper, most of the leading field service platforms are massively overbuilt. You don't need dispatch optimization across 20 techs — you need fast quoting, painless invoicing, and a way to take a payment in the truck. Here are the 5 platforms that actually fit a one-truck operation, ranked.
buying_criteria: Strong mobile app (you'll use it in the truck more than at a desk)
Free trial so you can test before committing

use_cases.h1: Best Plumbing Software for Small Teams (4-15 Techs) in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: Top picks for plumbing companies with 4-15 technicians. Real pricing comparison, feature coverage, and the team-size breakpoints where each option starts paying for itself.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Plumbing company, 4-15 technicians, residential + light commercial
use_cases.intro: Plumbing companies in the 4-15 tech range are in the most competitive segment of FSM software — too big for solo tools like Joist, too small for ServiceTitan or BuildOps. The 5 platforms below are specifically built for this sweet spot, with the team-size economics that actually work at 4-15 dispatched techs.
buying_criteria: Pricing transparent enough to compare in a single afternoon

use_cases.h1: Best Software for Residential Cleaning Businesses in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: Compare cleaning company software for 1-30 cleaner operations. Recurring scheduling, team management, automated billing — picked for residential cleaning services.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Residential cleaning business, 1-30 cleaners, recurring-service model
use_cases.intro: Cleaning businesses have specific software needs the general FSM tools handle poorly — recurring weekly/bi-weekly schedules, team check-in/check-out via geofencing, and automated billing on a subscription cadence. These 5 platforms are ranked specifically for residential cleaning operations.
buying_criteria: GPS tracking and geofencing for crew check-ins
Customer portal with skip-this-week and reschedule self-service

use_cases.h1: Best Software for Commercial Pest Control Operators in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: Pest control software ranked for commercial operators. Route optimization, chemical tracking, recurring service agreements, regulatory compliance.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Commercial pest control company, 5-100 employees, B2B contract-based
use_cases.intro: Commercial pest control is a different operational model than residential — service agreements, route-density optimization, and chemical compliance reporting are the make-or-break features. These 5 platforms specifically serve commercial pest operators with the workflows you actually use daily.
buying_criteria: Route optimization for dense urban routes
Commercial-grade B2B invoicing (PO numbers, payment terms)
Mobile signature capture for service confirmations

use_cases.h1: Best Electrical Contractor Software for Growing Teams (10-30) in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: Top FSM platforms for growing electrical contracting businesses (10-30 electricians). Dispatching, project management, billing, and the features that matter at this size.
use_cases.intro: Electrical contractors in the 10-30 employee range hit a unique inflection point — you've outgrown spreadsheets and basic FSM tools, but ServiceTitan-class enterprise platforms are still 12-18 months away. These 5 platforms ride that middle ground with the right depth for growing shops.
buying_criteria: Project work AND service work in one platform
Reporting deep enough to spot underperforming teams

use_cases.h1: Best Roofing Software for Insurance Restoration Work in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: Roofing CRM software for storm restoration and insurance-claim heavy contractors. Xactimate integration, aerial measurements, production tracking.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Roofing contractor, 5-100 employees, insurance restoration + retail mix
use_cases.intro: Roofing companies that work insurance claims need software that integrates with Xactimate, supports aerial measurement workflows, and tracks production through complex multi-stage projects. Generic FSM tools (Jobber, Housecall Pro) don't cut it. These 5 are built specifically for the insurance-restoration model.
buying_criteria: Photo and document management for claims documentation
Production tracking across multi-day jobs with multiple crews
Supplier integration (Beacon, ABC Supply, SRS Distribution)

use_cases.h1: Best Landscaping Software with Snow Management in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: Landscape company software with route-based snow service management. Year-round operations, snow routes, salt tracking, multi-season billing.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Landscape company offering year-round services including commercial snow management
use_cases.intro: Landscape companies running snow services in winter need software built for it — snow-specific route plans, per-storm billing logic, salt and materials tracking, and the ability to dispatch crews in pre-dawn storm response. These 5 platforms handle both green-season and snow-season operations cleanly.
buying_criteria: Snow route management (separate from green-season routes)
Pre-dawn crew dispatch and storm-response workflows

use_cases.h1: Best QuickBooks-Native Software for Trades Contractors in 2026
use_cases.meta_description: FSM software that integrates deeply with QuickBooks Online and Desktop. Two-way sync, real-time job costing, contractor accounting workflows.
use_cases.buyer_profile: Trades contractor whose accountant insists on QuickBooks-tight integration
use_cases.intro: If your accountant lives in QuickBooks and refuses to learn anything else, your FSM software choice is narrowed dramatically. These 5 platforms have the deepest, most reliable QuickBooks integrations — two-way sync, real-time job costing, and contractor-specific accounting flows like AIA billing and certified payroll.
buying_criteria: Two-way QuickBooks sync (not just one-way push)
QuickBooks Desktop AND QuickBooks Online support
Real-time job costing as you complete jobs
